title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness around Claude Code for large codebases, featuring components like self-improving hooks, path-scoped skills, LSP, MCP for symbol search, and subagents. The video emphasizes that the context and tooling infrastructure around the model matters more than the model itself.
